channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Meta jumps into AI coding market in effort to chase Anthropic and OpenAI
item.description: Meta is upgrading its Muse Spark artificial intelligence model under the leadership of AI chief Alexandr Wang.

item.title: June home sales disappoint as prices reach an all-time high
item.description: Home sales dropped in June month over month as mortgage rates remain stubbornly high. Prices hit an all-time high.

item.title: Micron shares rise 7% after announcing billions more in U.S. chipmaking investments
item.description: Micron announced a new round of investments aimed at boosting the U.S. semiconductor supply chain.

item.title: Stocks tick higher as chipmakers rise, oil prices fall: Live updates
item.description: The U.S. launched fresh strikes on Iran, after President Donald Trump said Wednesday he may no longer be interested in negotiating a deal.

item.title: Oil prices fall as market bets U.S.-Iran fighting won't escalate into wider war
item.description: Oil prices turned lower on Thursday after the U.S. carried out fresh strikes on Iran, renewing concerns about supply disruptions in the Middle East.

item.title: Josh Brown says this bank that was once an 'ugly duckling' is now one of the Best Stocks in the Market
item.description: Josh Brown and Sean Russo break down this bank name on their Best Stocks list.

item.title: Trump can halt trade with Spain using law behind scrapped tariffs: Greer
item.description: Trump asserted that IEEPA authorized him to slap tariffs on nearly every country on earth, but the Supreme Court struck down those import duties.

item.title: Goldman Sachs wins $70 billion in asset management deals with Verizon, Lockheed Martin
item.description: Competition in the multitrillion-dollar market for retirement assets is fierce among managers such as Goldman Sachs, BlackRock, Russell Investments and Mercer.

item.title: Ohio is America's Top State for Business in 2026, capping yearslong rise with first No. 1 finish
item.description: Ohio tops CNBC's rankings for the first time in 2026, with the Buckeye State culminating a yearslong climb as the place to do business in America.

item.title: Tanker traffic through Strait of Hormuz slows after Iranian attacks trigger renewed fighting with U.S.
item.description: Oil has rallied more than 7% this week as investors worry that exports through Hormuz could plunge as the U.S. and Iran fight for control of the strait.

item.title: Arkansas is America's Most Improved State in 2026 as workers move to Walmart's home for low costs, high quality of life
item.description: Arkansas is the Most Improved State for Business in CNBC's annual Top States rankings, as working-age adults are attracted by low costs and quality of life.

item.title: Hawaii is America's Worst State for Business in 2026, even its legendary quality of life takes a dip
item.description: Hawaii, America's Worst State for Business in 2026, is trying to address one of the few disadvantages it can control: quality of life. It isn’t easy.

item.title: Trump says Iran called to make a deal after U.S. strikes; adds it's unclear if war is back on
item.description: When asked whether the U.S. and Iran are returning to a full-scale military conflict, Trump responded: "I don't know."

item.title: PepsiCo earnings miss estimates as U.S. consumers tighten their budgets
item.description: PepsiCo reported weaker-than-expected quarterly earnings despite strong international demand.

item.title: Bank of America's No. 1 way to play the Strait of Hormuz closing again
item.description: The bank has a buy rating on the oil and gas name.

item.title: What AI companies want for the millions they're spending on elections
item.description: Lawmakers are working on AI legislation — and two major industry PACs are each pushing for their own version of regulation.

item.title: Here's how Trump Account assets may affect your college aid eligibility
item.description: Assets in a Trump Account may affect a student's need-based college aid eligibility, based on how income is reported on the FAFSA.

item.title: Ukraine’s drone playbook is wreaking havoc in Russia — and upending where NATO wants to invest
item.description: Ukraine’s deep drone strikes on Russian refineries are reshaping the war and pushing NATO toward a $40 billion counter-drone plan.

item.title: Clean power comeback? Don't count out renewable energy and this one stock in particular
item.description: Clean power is responsible for roughly 90% of all new electrical capacity being added to the grid, according to the CEO of the American Clean Power Association.

item.title: From 'dear Donald' to 'Trump trillion': Inside NATO chief Mark Rutte's U.S. strategy
item.description: NATO chief Mark Rutte lavished praise on U.S. President Donald Trump during a fractious summit in Turkey this week.

item.title: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Thursday
item.description: Chip stocks are jumping again, and Pepsi reported a mixed quarter.

item.title: Private student loans with rewards: These lenders offer cash back and discounts
item.description: Find out where student loan borrowers can earn cash back for getting good grades, graduating, paying on time and more.

item.title: Platner quits Maine Senate race; Democrats set to pick new nominee
item.description: Maine Democrats must now replace Platner with less than four months until the midterm elections.

item.title: AstraZeneca stock drops 9% after heart drug trial miss deals rare blow to pharma powerhouse
item.description: A late-stage clinical trial failed to miss its primary endpoint, U.K.'s laregst drugmaker said Thursday.

item.title: Meta to put AI chip into production in September as it looks to double computing capacity, Reuters reports
item.description: Meta plans to start manufacturing an artificial intelligence chip from September as part of its plan to boost overall computing power, Reuters reports.

item.title: Why the world’s best-performing stock market this year fell into bear territory
item.description: The Kospi fell more than 5% on Wednesday, which brought it 20% below its June 19 record high, according to LSEG data.

item.title: Trump announces long-shot bid to get Supreme Court to rehear birthright citizenship case
item.description: Trump already asked the Supreme Court to reconsider denying him an appeal of a verdict holding him liable for sexually abusing and defaming E. Jean Carroll.

item.title: Waymo to start driverless rides in 4 more U.S. markets as expansion accelerates
item.description: Waymo has a big lead in the nascent U.S. robotaxi market, and is opening up in more cities.

item.title: Meta is building its first big Canadian data center as AI expansion crosses the border
item.description: Meta is building its first big Canadian data center as AI expansion crosses the border.

item.title: World Cup drives Google Search to record queries per second
item.description: The milestone comes amid Lionel Messi and Argentina's popularity.
